column3: Operational definition (coded 1 when policy explicitly states...)

column1: Required disclosure template OR standardized statement language
column3: A named template/form for AI-use disclosure is required, or standardized statement language is prescribed (beyond a general expectation to disclose).

column1: Faculty procedures for suspected AI misuse
column3: Policy provides procedural steps for instructors/staff when undisclosed AI misuse is suspected (e.g., documentation, escalation, review pathway).
Policy explicitly treats nondisclosure/misrepresentation as misconduct or specifies penalties/sanctions tied to nondisclosure.
Policy explicitly mentions AI-content detectors/detection software in the context of assessment or academic-integrity processes.
Policy explicitly states detector outputs are not dispositive/cannot be used as sole evidence for misconduct findings.
Policy requires routine detector screening of submissions (e.g., mandatory AI-detection check prior to submission, marking, or progression).
